profileUrl.title: Linktree profile URL
profileUrl.description: Full URL of the Linktree profile to scrape, e.g. https://linktr.ee/jasminemaharjan__

linkFilter.title: Link filter (hostname contains)
linkFilter.description: Only keep links whose hostname contains this text (case-insensitive). Default 'daraz' keeps daraz.com.np, s.daraz.com.np and click.daraz.com.np links. Leave EMPTY to return every link on the profile.

expandShortLinks.title: Expand short links
expandShortLinks.description: Follow redirects on short links (e.g. s.daraz.com.np) to also capture the final product URL. Slower, and best run with Apify Proxy enabled.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Using Apify Proxy is recommended to avoid IP rate limits.
